mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CMT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO cmt ( CMT_NO, CMT_CN, CMT_STARNG, CMT_CLSF, CMT_HIDE_YN, TRIP_COURSE_NO, REG_NO ) VALUES ( #{cmtNo}, #{cmtCn}, #{cmtStarng}, #{cmtClsf}, #{cmtHideYn}, #{tripCourseNo}, #{regNo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE cmt SET CMT_CN = #{cmtCn}, CMT_STARNG = #{cmtStarng}, CMT_CLSF = #{cmtClsf}, CMT_HIDE_YN = #{cmtHideYn}, TRIP_COURSE_NO = #{tripCourseNo}, CMT_MOD = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), CMT_MOD_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), MOD_NO = #{modNo} WHERE CMT_NO = #{cmtNo}
mapper.select: SELECT CMT_NO, CMT_CN, CMT_STARNG, CMT_CLSF, CMT_HIDE_YN, TRIP_COURSE_NO, CMT_REG, CMT_REG_HM, CMT_MOD, CMT_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO FROM cmt WHERE CMT_NO = #{cmtNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, T1.* FROM ( SELECT CMT_NO, CMT_CN, CMT_STARNG, CMT_CLSF, CMT_HIDE_YN, TRIP_COURSE_NO, CMT_REG, CMT_REG_HM, CMT_MOD, CMT_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO FROM cmt WHERE 1 = 1
AND CMT_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND TRIP_COURSE_NO = #{searchWord}
ORDER BY CMT_NO DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1

SELECT c.CMT_NO, c.CMT_CN, c.CMT_STARNG, c.CMT_CLSF, c.CMT_HIDE_YN, c.TRIP_COURSE_NO, c.CMT_REG, c.CMT_MOD, c.REG_NO, c.MOD_NO, u.USER_NICK, (SELECT LISTAGG(af.FILE_PATH_NM, '||') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY af.FILE_NO) FROM attach_file af WHERE af.BOARD_CLSF = 'comment' AND af.BOARD_ID = c.CMT_NO) AS FILE_PATH_LIST FROM cmt c LEFT JOIN ss_user u ON c.REG_NO = u.USER_NO WHERE c.TRIP_COURSE_NO = #{tripCourseNo} AND c.CMT_CLSF = #{cmtClsf} AND (c.CMT_HIDE_YN IS NULL OR c.CMT_HIDE_YN = 'N') ORDER BY c.CMT_NO DESC
